---
title: "Research"
---

## Mitochondrial Genomics

I study mitochondrial DNA variation, variant interpretation, NUMTs, heteroplasmy, and comparative genomics.

## Large-scale Sequencing Analysis

I work with WGS/WES-scale datasets, variant calling, annotation, and burden analysis.

## Research Interests

- Mitochondrial DNA variation
- Variant interpretation
- NUMTs and heteroplasmy artifacts
- Primate comparative genomics
- Large-scale WGS/WES analysis
